title: Natural Rope Plant Basket with Handles – 30cm Diameter x 20cm Height – Indoor Outdoor Jute Rope Planter Basket Pot Cover with Plastic Liner – Rustic Decorative Storage for Plants Cointainer
features: Natural Jute Rope Design: Crafted with thick, durable jute rope for a rustic and boho-inspired look that suits indoor or outdoor settings.
Size for Medium Plants: Basket measures 30cm in diameter and 20cm in height – ideal for a wide range of plant pots and decorative uses.
Plastic Liner Included: Comes with a removable plastic liner to contain soil and moisture, keeping surfaces clean and protected.
Strong Rope Handles: Equipped with two sturdy jute rope handles for easy lifting and repositioning. Two sturdy rope handles make it convenient to move around – perfect for indoor or outdoor use.

Multi-Purpose Basket: Ideal as a plant pot cover, storage solution, or decorative bin for laundry, toys, crafts, or blankets. Note: Decorative plant or flower shown in images is not included – basket only.
description: Elevate your indoor or outdoor décor with this beautiful Jute Rope Planter Basket, handcrafted from thick, woven natural jute for an earthy, rustic look. This round basket is designed to be as functional as it is decorative, ideal for holding potted plants or organizing your home with a touch of natural charm. Measuring 30 cm in diameter and 20 cm in height, this planter basket is sized just right for medium plant pots or decorative accents. A built-in plastic liner keeps moisture contained, making it safe for live plants or soil-based arrangements while protecting your floors or shelves from water damage. Two sturdy rope handles add both practicality and style, allowing you to easily move the basket from room to room, or from indoors to your patio, garden, or balcony. The tightly woven structure and natural jute texture make it a versatile piece that fits into any interior style, from bohemian to farmhouse, coastal, or minimal. This basket isn’t just for plants — use it as an attractive storage solution for everything from laundry and towels to toys, blankets, or craft supplies. The multi-functional design offers beauty and utility for any living space. Please note: The basket is sold empty. Decorative plants or flowers shown in some images are for demonstration purposes only and are not included. Product Dimensions: Diameter: 30 cm Height: 20 cm Suggested Uses: Decorative plant pot cover Indoor/outdoor Garden Patio Storage
